candidates.why: Direct match for total current assets on the balance sheet.

variables.notes: Clear reported total current assets line.

candidates.why: Direct balance-sheet cash and cash equivalents line.

variables.notes: Selected the balance sheet cash line, not the cash flow reconciliation lines.

candidates.why: Direct match for total current liabilities.

variables.notes: Clear reported total current liabilities line.

candidates.why: Represents current borrowings from financial institutions; fits short-term debt and excludes leases.
Represents current portion of long-term debt due within one year; relevant STD component and excludes leases.
Could include financing-related current liabilities, but label is broad and less clean than explicit loans/maturities.

variables.notes: No single clean total current borrowings line is reported. Selected the minimal explicit non-lease debt components: current loans plus current maturities of long-term debt. Manual review recommended because these two lines may partially overlap in some years.

candidates.why: Direct match for taxes payable/current tax liabilities.
Best available balance-sheet line for property, plant and equipment; represents net tangible fixed assets.
PPE-related but appears to be a component/balancing line rather than the clean total PPE line.
Gross PPE component only, not preferred over the reported total tangible non-current assets.

variables.notes: Chosen outside the shortlist because it is the clear reported total tangible asset/PPE line and is preferable to intangible candidates.

candidates.why: Direct match for net cash flow from operating activities.

candidates.row_label: Cash flow from operating activities before changes in working capital
candidates.why: Operating cash flow subtotal before working-capital changes, not the final net operating cash flow.

variables.notes: Selected the final net operating cash flow line, not the pre-working-capital subtotal.
